case_title: PHILLIPS, JENNIFER vs. MACY'S WEST INC. DBA FEDERATED/MACY'S WEST INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHILLIPS, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT MACY'S WEST INC. DBA FEDERATED/MACY'S WEST INC.
